blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that customers are charged monthly regardless of attendance.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of monthly payment regardless of attendance, but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a customer is charged monthly regardless of attendance, there is no direct evidence provided that verifies this payment structure is implemented or functioning as required. The absence of specific checks or confirmations regarding the payment model leads to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the payment model that charges monthly regardless of attendance.
